response.justification: Bogdan presents a strong match for the Senior Fullstack Developer role with 15+ years of professional experience spanning fullstack web, backend services, cloud infrastructure, and developer tooling. His current position at re:cinq directly covers TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators and agentic workflows, matching several of the job's differentiating requirements. Prior experience at Optilyz aligns closely with the primary stack (TypeScript, AWS CDK, React, MongoDB at scale). A deeply embedded testing culture is evidenced by open-source TDD tooling he authored, TDD workshops he facilitated, and explicit trunk-based TDD practice at RIDE Capital. The main gaps are the absence of Nest.js (a listed primary framework), no explicit mention of Vitest or Playwright by name, and Kotlin is missing with only Java appearing.
strengths: Current role at re:cinq includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, directly matching the 'AI agent development' requirement
Production-grade TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS CDK, and MongoDB experience at Optilyz (millions of mailings/year), covering most of the primary and secondary stack
Exceptionally strong testing culture: authored open-source TDD libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), ran TDD/Selenium workshops, and applied TDD with CI/CD and trunk-based development professionally
concerns: Nest.js is not mentioned anywhere in the resume despite being listed as a primary backend framework for the role
No explicit reference to Vitest, Jest, or Playwright, leaving the specific testing-framework requirement unverifiable from the resume alone
Kotlin is absent; only Java surfaces, leaving the Kotlin/JVM secondary requirement only partially addressed
